title: Minato's Furniture
body:
# This mod adds various furniture.
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7c861dd16ab0e0a19afb3f1bc2c1c38830e82fd.png)](https://discord.com/invite/EwUUyvG6CF)              [![CurseForge](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1F_E06T7Ub0VISRuobOqjGTOmO3OcGZYa)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minato-furniture)              ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b3296443f2df0883eeee6db626484ab5060f78f.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40f5067bd5ee3197a2aa199bb52d69cf254b95b1_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36cb8073877027982a7201362f1fabfbabf10a42_0.webp)

## Supported languages

En-US
Ja-JP




### If there's anything you'd like to see added, please write it in the comments section on Discord or Curse Forge. Please let me know if there are any new versions you'd like added. I'll add them if possible.
